holdings.name: Physical Silver (99.9% purity)
holdings.description: Direct investment in 99.9% pure physical silver stored in SEBI-approved vaults. Silver price referenced to LBMA Silver Price (USD/troy oz), converted to INR at RBI reference rate. Vault holdings reconciled and audited at regular intervals.

holdings.name: Cash & Equivalents
holdings.description: Residual cash for subscription/redemption liquidity. Held in overnight bank deposits or tri-party repo.
